name: Kabli Pulao
overview: Haji Mushtaq, an upright man from Lahore, and Barbeena, an Afghan girl in need. Haji Mushtaq, a 51-year-old muslim punjabi bachelor, leads a simple and straightforward life until he meets Barbeena.
